concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文列出了11条假设，包括优先覆盖人口、忽略区内位置差异、忽略随机偏差、等概率呼叫、比例影响、无同时呼叫、多车同区、呼叫率等于全国平均、呼叫占用时间10分钟、呼叫概率不随时间变化、呼叫独立。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1. Maximizing the number of people covered takes priority over minimizing response time. ... Assumption 6. No two emergencies occur at the same time. ...

concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 通过加权求和计算平均响应时间：对每个区域，取各救护车到达该区域的最小时间，乘以该区域人口，求和后除以总人口。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: For each of the 6 zones, it adds to the variable the minimum of the times the ambulances will make from each of the input zones, times the population of the current zone it is checking. It then divides this value by total population and returns it.

concepts_used.title: 最短路径算法（Dijkstra、Floyd）
concepts_used.how_used: 在计算覆盖人口时，需要找到从救护车所在区域到目标区域的最小时间，即最短路径。由于区域间直接时间已知，直接取最小值。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: For each zone i from 1 to 6, the program checks that the minimum from each of the input zone numbers to the zone i is less than or equal to the threshold.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变可用救护车数量（1、2、3辆）来测试模型对不同资源水平的敏感性，并分析同时呼叫情况下的表现。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We repeated this search for an ideal allocation of two ambulances. ... Finally, we considered one ambulance... Additionally, given these ideal distributions, it was considered how much time was required to move between them...

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分介绍了问题背景（美国每年2.4亿次911呼叫）、研究目标（优化救护车分布以最小化响应时间）和模型概述。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: There are 240 million 9-1-1 calls each year in the United States [1]. ... The problem then is to position ambulances so that the greatest number of people can be reached in the smallest amount of time possible.

concepts_used.title: 图表标题与编号规范
concepts_used.how_used: 论文中使用了表格展示区域间行驶时间和人口数据，并配有标题和编号。
concepts_used.source_excerpt:
| Travel | Times in Minutes |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Zones | 1 2 3 4 | 5 6 | ... |
| Zone | Population | ... |
